title: With Flowers.
content:
South winds jostle them,
    Bumblebees come,
    Hover, hesitate,
    Drink, and are gone.

    Butterflies pause
    On their passage Cashmere;
    I, softly plucking,
    Present them here!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "With Flowers.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
